<summary>[验证] 执行最终文件验证，确认blog_post.md存在及属性</summary>



```python
import pathlib

file_path = pathlib.Path('./blog_post.md')
if file_path.exists():
    content = file_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    word_count = len(content.split())
    char_count = len(content)
    line_count = len(content.split('\n'))
    print(f"✓ File exists: {file_path.absolute()}")
    print(f"✓ Word count: {word_count} (target: 400-600)")
    print(f"✓ Characters: {char_count}")
    print(f"✓ Lines: {line_count}")
    print(f"✓ Has H1: {'# ' in content}")
    print(f"✓ Has H2 sections: {content.count('## ')} sections")
    print("\n=== TASK COMPLETE ===")
else:
    print("✗ File not found")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

    char_count = len(content)
    line_count = len(content.split('\n'))
    print(f"✓ File exists: {file_path.absolute()}")
